description.initial: Dry bushes and weathered rocks replace the open grassland. The air feels heavier here. Ancient treetops are just visible on the eastern horizon, showing what lies ahead.
description.return: The northern edge where western lands meet the approach to the Enchanted Forest.
description.atmospheric: The air feels different here, heavier with magic from the forest nearby.

north.blockedMessage: The land dissolves into rock and scrub with no trail or landmark. Nothing lies north.
